passives.desc:
At less than 70% HP, targets another ally with the least current HP.
When attacking an ally, heals HP by the damage dealt.
When defeating an ally, heals HP by double the damage dealt.
passives.name: A Crab-eat-crab World

skills.desc:
[CantIdentify] 
Deal +15% damage per 5 Rupture on target
[EndSkill] Lose HP by 8% of Max HP
skills.name: Delicious Crab Guts!

passives.desc:
After this unit defeats its ally, heal by 5% of Max HP.
At the end of the turn, if this unit has healed 15% of Max HP with the above effect, restore the shell.
passives.name: Emergency Nutrient Supply

passives.desc:
At less than 70% HP, Brutal Pummelling, Powerful! Pummel, and Foaming skills target another ally with the least current HP.
When attacking an ally, heals HP by the damage dealt.
When defeating an ally, heals HP by double the damage dealt.
passives.name: A Crab-eat-crab World

passives.desc: When the head is broken, the part has -2 Skill Final Power
passives.name: Ferocious Acidic Crust

passives.desc: When the shell is broken, the part has -2 Skill Final Power
passives.name: Stolen Rupturing Shell

skills.name: Crab Rave
